page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i5g.8xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs using Intel Xeon 6982P-C processors running at a base frequency of 3.2 GHz. With a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio, this instance provides dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading, ensuring predictable performance for compute-intensive tasks.

The instance is equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM, providing 4.0 GB of memory per core. For local storage, it includes a bundled 1919 GB SSD, offering high-speed local data access. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 16 Gbps. The combination of dedicated CPU allocation and integrated local SSD storage makes this hardware profile highly resource-dense, offering qualitative cost efficiency for workloads requiring consistent I/O performance and dedicated processing power.

This server is suitable for database hosting, storage-heavy applications, and general-purpose enterprise workloads that benefit from dedicated CPU cores and fast local SSD storage. The lack of a GPU limits its applicability for hardware-accelerated machine learning tasks, but its balanced memory-to-CPU ratio and high-speed network baseline make it a reliable choice for transactional databases and distributed file systems.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i5g.8xlarge is an x86_64 server instance featuring 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs powered by Intel Xeon 6982P-C processors running at 3.2 GHz. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, it provides a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio for predictable, non-hyperthreaded performance. The instance is configured with 128.0 GB of RAM, a bundled 1919 GB local SSD, and a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps. With its balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and integrated high-capacity local storage, this server offers qualitative cost efficiency for resource-dense environments. It is well-suited for database hosting, transactional systems, and enterprise applications requiring dedicated compute resources and fast local storage.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i5g.8xlarge is a KVM-based server featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores at 3.2 GHz, 128 GB RAM, a 1919 GB local SSD, and 16 Gbps network bandwidth for database and enterprise workloads.

tagline: A dedicated 32-core Intel Xeon server featuring integrated local SSD storage and balanced memory for demanding database and enterprise workloads.
